en: What?
Dad made dinner, okay?
I'm not hungry. I'm going to my room.
Uh-uh-uh, sit down. We need to talk.
Oh my God.
So, where were you tonight? Nowhere.
And who were you with? No one. Oh.
Dad, are you gonna say something?
Kids, it's okay to try new things.
ko: 아이들, 새로운 것을 시도하는 건 괜찮아.

en: After all, your mom supported me
ko: 결국, 네 엄마가 내가 베스파를 샀을 때 나를 지지해줬어.

en: when I bought that Vespa.
Let her vape. You're vaping now?
It's bubblegum mint, bitch.
Mom, we know this is a weird time for you
ko: 엄마, 이 시기가 너에게 이상한 시간이라는 거 알아.

en: and your body is changing,
so we got you this book.
When a Period Becomes a Comma of Diabetes and Perimenopause.
ko: 생리가 당뇨병과 폐경의 쉼표가 될 때.

en: Oh my God, you're so embarrassing.
Don't talk about my body.
Kids, your mother's changing body
is between her and the girl at Claire's who pierced her areolas. Oh my God.
ko: 그녀와 클레어스에서 유두를 뚫어준 소녀 사이의 일이야. 세상에.
